label: Lattice
description: Connect Lattice to access performance reviews, engagement surveys, 1:1s, and goals data.

form.title: Connect Lattice
form.subtitle: Paste your Lattice API key to give Anton access to performance, engagement, and 1:1 data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from Lattice Admin → Integrations → API. The fastest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Lattice API Key

1. Log in to Lattice as an **admin**.
2. Click your avatar in the top-right corner and go to **Admin**.
3. In the left sidebar, navigate to **Integrations → API**.
4. Click **Create API Key** (or **Generate new token** if one already exists).
5. Give the key a descriptive name like `Anton`.
6. Copy the key immediately — Lattice may only show it once.
7. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Only Lattice admins can access the Integrations → API section.
- The key grants access to all data your admin account can see, including performance reviews, engagement surveys, and 1:1s.
- If you lose the key, revoke it from the same page and generate a new one.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Lattice Admin → Integrations → API. Copy and paste the full key.

fields.name: subdomain
fields.label: Lattice Subdomain
fields.description: The subdomain of your Lattice account (e.g. 'yourcompany' from yourcompany.latticehq.com). Leave blank if unsure.
